summary: Iteration 98: Final Launch Readiness Test - All critical fixes verified. Profile API 500 error (COVER_PRESETS) fixed, SmartDock minimize positions to bottom-right corner correctly. All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend pages load correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical fixes verified: Profile API no longer returns 500 (COVER_PRESETS constant added), SmartDock minimize positions to bottom-right (x=1875, y=933). All pages tested: Homepage, Dashboard, Profile, Pricing, Trade Circle, Sacred Texts, Settings.

profile_api_fix.details: GET /api/profile/me returns 200 (was 500 NameError: COVER_PRESETS). COVER_PRESETS constant now defined in profiles.py

profile_covers_endpoint.details: GET /api/profile/covers returns 6 cover presets (cosmic-nebula, zen-garden, ocean-waves, mountain-peak, sacred-geometry, aurora-borealis)

dashboard_stats.details: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns mood_count, journal_count, streak data

subscription_tiers.details: GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns all 5 tiers (free, starter, plus, premium, super_user)

stripe_checkout.details: POST /api/subscriptions/checkout returns Stripe checkout URL with tier_id and origin_url

trade_circle_listings.details: GET /api/trade-circle/listings returns listings. POST creates listing with category (goods/services/both) and offering field

sacred_texts.details: GET /api/sacred-texts returns 15+ texts including Bhagavad Gita, Tao Te Ching, Upanishads, Dhammapada

mood_insights.details: GET /api/moods/insights returns AI mood insights (requires auth)

smartdock_minimize.details: SmartDock minimize button clicks → tiny dot in bottom-right corner (x=1875, y=933). Restore button clicks → full dock returns

profile_page.details: Profile page loads with user info (avatar, name) and customization section (Theme, Music, Avatar)

pricing_page.details: Pricing page loads with 5 tier cards (Free, Starter, Plus, Premium, Super User) and 4 upgrade buttons. Credit packs section visible

trade_circle_page.details: Trade Circle page loads with stats (Active Listings, Trades Completed, My Listings, Pending Offers, Trade Karma), listings, and New Listing button

sacred_texts_page.details: Sacred Texts page loads with 15 text cards and search functionality

settings_page.details: Settings page loads with Sound & Audio, Visual & Display (Color Theme), Accessibility sections
